title: [ExportVerilog] Improve pretty-printing of sv.for (when wrapping).
body:
Treat the three statements as "assign-likes", and if cannot emit a single `for (init; check; update) begin`, then break these onto their own lines:
```
for (init;
     check;
     update) begin
```

Add small test for this (and don't change behavior when not wrapping).
